title: Environmental and wildlife enforcement - Canada.ca
content:
## Environmental and wildlife enforcement
Environment and Climate Change Canada: Enforcing laws that protect water, land, wildlife, and habitat.

## Services and information

### Report a pollution incident or wildlife crime
What to do in a suspected pollution incident or wildlife crime.

### Enforcement responsibilities and activities
Enforcement measures and notifications, policies, and the Environmental Offenders Registry.

### About the Enforcement Branch
Mandate, structure, roles and responsibilities.

### Work with Enforcement
Explore career opportunities with the Enforcement Branch of the Government of Canada.

### Enforcement notifications
Notices of successful environmental prosecutions across Canada.

### Environmental and wildlife acts and regulations
Laws enforced by Environment and Climate Change Canada.

### Compliance and enforcement policies
Policies that outline the measures used by Environment and Climate Change Canada to achieve compliance with its laws.

### Give feedback about this page
Thank you for your feedback.
